race.comment: BOSSY STAR (3) began awkwardly and didn't recover when resuming over 1208m at Sale last time out. Has a far better second-up record and this is his pet trip, with seven top three finishes from eight attempts. Sure to play a key role. Speedy gelding GOT OUT THE FENCE (2) has led for the judge at his last couple over 1200m but failed to finish off. Draws the fence and might prove tough to reel in coming back to this trip. WILD ROSES GROW (10) needed the hit-out at Horsham last start. Kept fresh and from a nice gate is not out of contention. SMASHING RUBY (13) will be giving them a start but with nothing on her back she is one to watch for late in proceedings. NEVER A THOUGHT (4) didn't do a bad job first-up at Echuca and should be more effective over this slightly longer journey.
